race.comment: STAR PREDICTION (3) excellent second-three starts back at Canterbury in Highway class. Big jump in class with a respectable seventh over 1200m at Port Macquarie in the MNC Champs. Deep into the campaign and set to bounce back at this level with the 3kg claim. MIRAI SAN (6) rewarded for his consistency with a gritty on-pace win over 1200m at Beaumont (Newcastle) in C1 class. Top-three prospect again in this harder contest. LAIZABOUT (2) improving gelding with a good record on his home track. Unsuited first-up over the 1000m at Tamworth with a fast finishing third. Comes to hand quickly and drawn to stalk the speed in a winnable race. GLENBOWER (5) has a host of gear changes for this after covering a stack of ground in the run with a fading seventh over 1400m at Scone. Drawn out again and capable of better over this trip. FAVOUR THE BOLD (4) talented gelding who comes back a few levels today after catching the eye first-up when second at Scone. Look for him late.
